role_summary: Product vision and strategic requirements specification that defines the purpose, functional boundaries, operational constraints, and success criteria for a legacy code analysis tool. It serves as the authoritative blueprint guiding the design and development of an AI-driven domain knowledge extraction engine.
finding: The system is designed to decouple business intent from technical implementation by automatically extracting and synthesizing legacy code into a technology-agnostic wiki. It operates via a two-phase process: direct extraction of core domains, entities, integrations, and specifications from source files, followed by aggregate synthesis of user personas, user stories, and high-level structural views. This enables development teams to completely rebuild the system in a modern architecture using only the generated documentation, without referencing the original codebase.
